attributes.description: Overview of Audit logs from OpenAI

params.markdown:
#### OpenAI

**Audit**

This dashboard gives visibility into the audit data stream of OpenAI, showing how API usage and platform actions are recorded and monitored. It highlights total events, trends of audit events over time, event types distribution over time, and event type breakdowns. It surfaces top users by audit activity, actor types. Geographic context is provided through audit events by country, and source activity is shown via top source IPs. Together, these panels offer an audit-level view to support security oversight, compliance, and usage analysis.

**[Integration Page](/app/integrations/detail/openai/overview)**

attributes.title: [Logs Openai] Audit
